utility_evaluation.REASONING:

- financing: includes financing solution with terms (mortgage amount, down payment, lender, contact, arrangement fee). Terms are reasonably specified. Fully specified.
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs (provider, contact, cost, services). Fully specified.
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (provider, contact, cost, services). Fully specified.
- setup_services: utility and setup services (utilities description, provider, cost, inspection with provider, contact, cost). Fully specified.
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown (property_cost, financing_fees, legal_services, inspection, moving_services, utility_setup, totals). Fully specified.
All 6 items are covered and fully specified.
